title: Erianthemum nyikense
taxonomy: Erianthemum nyikense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It belongs to the genus Erianthemum, which is a group of parasitic plants. Erianthemum nyikense is native to Malawi and Mozambique, and it has been found to be a hemiparasitic plant, obtaining some of its nutrients from the surrounding environment. The classification of Erianthemum nyikense at the higher taxonomic levels is as follows: kingdom: Plantae, clade: Angiosperms, clade: Eudicots, clade: Asterids. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and characteristics of this species.
